title: Stefan Ratchford
extract:
Stefan Guy Ratchford (born 19 July 1988) is an English retired rugby league footballer who last played as a fullback for the Warrington Wolves in the Super League and the England Knights and England international at international level.
He previously played for the Salford City Reds between 2007 and 2011 in the Super League and National League One. Throughout his career Ratchford played as a fullback, wing, centre, stand-off, scrum-half, hooker and loose forward.
